description: Domain invariant declarations for Finance product

invariants.name: Transaction atomicity
invariants.description: Financial transactions must be atomic with no partial commits

invariants.name: Transaction state machine
invariants.description: Transactions must follow valid state transitions (pending -> processing -> completed/failed)

invariants.name: Financial audit trail
invariants.description: All financial transactions must be logged with immutable audit trail

invariants.name: Account balance consistency
invariants.description: Account balances must remain consistent across concurrent transactions

invariants.name: Financial data encryption
invariants.description: Sensitive financial data must be encrypted at rest and in transit

invariants.name: Transaction authorization
invariants.description: Transactions must be authorized by authenticated users with proper permissions

invariants.name: Tenant financial isolation
invariants.description: Financial data must be isolated by tenant with no cross-tenant access

invariants.name: Regulatory compliance
invariants.description: Financial operations must comply with regulatory requirements (SOX, PCI-DSS)
